sources.title: Bessemer Cloud Index - Developer Tools Segment

result.summary: Usage-based pricing now dominates developer tools at 67% adoption, with a hybrid model (free tier + usage-based + enterprise flat rate) emerging as the highest-converting approach, yielding 35% better net revenue retention than pure seat-based pricing.
key_findings: 67% of developer tools have adopted usage-based pricing components, up from 41% in 2022, with compute-minutes and API calls as top metrics
Free tier to paid conversion rates average 4.2% for pure PLG devtools, but hybrid models with sales-assisted enterprise tiers achieve 8.7% conversion
Median price point for team tier is $20/seat/month with usage caps, while enterprise contracts average $48K ACV with committed usage minimums
